use_cases: A simple counter component for displaying and adjusting numeric values
Basic increment/decrement functionality for forms or settings panels
Foundation component for building more complex stepper or quantity selector UI
Educational example for React state management with useState hook
Placeholder component for prototyping interface layouts and interactions
ai_summary: A minimalist numeric counter component featuring increment and decrement buttons with React state management. Displays a count value centered within a flex container, styled with Tailwind CSS. Serves as a fundamental interactive element for building quantity selectors, steppers, or any interface requiring numerical input controls.
